name: Lithuanian / Baltic Paganism
note: The indigenous polytheist religion of the Baltic peoples (Lithuanians, Latvians, Old Prussians). Centred on a pantheon of nature deities (Dievas, Perkunas/thunder god, Laima/fate). Lithuania was the last country in Europe to be Christianised (officially 1387). Baltic paganism left deep traces in Lithuanian folk culture and language.
